profile.name: K. Sri Rishikesh Varma
profile.title: AI & Machine Learning Engineer | Data Engineer
profile.bio: High-impact AI Engineer specializing in Small Language Models (SLMs) and hybrid neuro-symbolic architectures. Expert in building low-latency, privacy-preserving AI systems and scalable data infrastructures.

highlights: Researching API integrations and utilizing advanced scrapers to aggregate real-time news for automated social media dissemination.
Conducting engaging workshops and research initiatives focused on geopolitical analysis and global trends.

publications.title: PhishNinja: An NLP-Driven Framework for Phishing and Spam Detection Using Explainable AI
publications.meta: Application No. 202541111904 A, India | 98% accuracy via quantized on-device inference

publications.title: Phishing Detection: A Comprehensive Survey of Methods and Trends

projects.title: PhishNinja
projects.subtitle: Agentic AI Security Framework
projects.description: An enterprise-grade, distributed cybersecurity framework engineered to isolate and neutralize multi-modal phishing, spam, and quishing vectors in real-time under sub-second constraints using custom Multi-Agent Systems.

projects.title: AppCompiler
projects.subtitle: Self-Healing SaaS Architecture Engine
projects.description: A deterministic AI-driven compiler that transforms natural language intent into executable full-stack SaaS architectures with automated cross-layer validation via a 4-stage agentic workflow.

projects.title: Story Writer
projects.subtitle: Baby Dragon Hatchling Architecture
projects.description: A high-performance storytelling engine built on Small Language Model (SLM) logic to create non-contradictory, creative narratives bypassing cloud dependencies completely.

projects.title: NutriVision
projects.subtitle: AI Nutritionist Platform
projects.description: A health assistant application using Computer Vision to recognize food items and provide instant nutritional analysis alongside personalized diet optimization algorithms.
